---
title: "Mary Elizabeth Sumner"
---

## Mary Elizabeth Sumner

**Dates:** (31 Dec 1828-11 Aug 1921)

**Maiden name:** (Heywood)

### Description

founder of the Mothers’ Union

### Biography

She married (1848) the Rt. Rev. George Henry Sumner (1824-1909), Rector from 1851 of Old Arlesford and later Bishop of Guildford.  She founded the Mother's Union.  She was mother of Heywood Sumner the artist.

### Letters

- Letter from May 12 [1900]
- [To Christabel Rose Coleridge, July 23d [1899]](../letters/3412_To_Christabel_Rose_Coleridge.html)
- [To Mary Elizabeth Sumner, Feb 10th 1899](../letters/3396_To_Mary_Elizabeth_Sumner.html)
- Letter from May 18 [1898]
- Letter from Decr 21st 1897
- Letter from Sept 20th 1897  
- Letter from June 2 [1893?]
- Letter from February 27 [1893]
- Letter from Feb 23rd 1893
- Letter from Jan 1st 1892
- Letter from Aug 4th 1890
- Letter from April 15th [<i>c</i>. 1890]
- Letter from April 15th [1887?[[footnote:1]]]
- Letter from Jan 10th 1887
- Letter from April 2 [1886]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
